contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT.WildCat Require Import Core Universe Opposite Bifunctor.
Require Import AbSES.Core AbSES.Pullback AbSES.Pushout AbSES.DirectSum.

(** * The Baer sum of two short exact sequences, lemmas and consequences. *)

(** The Baer sum of two short exact sequences is obtained from the pointwise direct sum by pushing forward along the codiagonal and then pulling back along the diagonal. (Swapping the order of pushing forward and pulling back produces an isomorphic short exact sequence.) *)

Definition abses_baer_sum `{Univalence} {B A : AbGroup@{u}} (E F : AbSES B A)
  : AbSES B A
  := abses_pullback ab_diagonal (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)).

(** ** [AbSES'] is a bifunctor *)

(** Given a morphism [f] of short exact sequences, the pushout of the domain along [f_1] equals the pullback of the codomain along [f_3]. *)

goals.conclusion: abses_pushout (component1 f) E $== abses_pullback (component3 f) E'
abses_pushout (component1 f) E $== abses_pullback (component3 f) E'

contents: (* The morphism [f : E -> E'] factors as [E -> f_1 E -> E'], where the first map is the map defining the pushout [f_1 E] and the second map is denoted [abses_pushout_morphism_rec f] below.  This second map is the identity on the first component, so it presents its domain as the pullback of [E'] along [f_3]. *)
(** Given a morphism [f] of short exact sequences, the pushout of the domain along [f_1] equals the pullback of the codomain along [f_3]. *)

Definition abses_pushout_is_pullback `{Univalence} {A A' B B' : AbGroup}
      {E : AbSES B A} {E' : AbSES B' A'} (f : AbSESMorphism E E')
  : abses_pushout (component1 f) E = abses_pullback (component3 f) E'
  := equiv_path_abses_iso (abses_pushout_is_pullback' f).

goals.conclusion: abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) $== abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)
abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) $== abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)

contents: (* There are morphisms [Eg -> E] and [E -> fE] by definition of the pullback and pushout. We define [F : Eg -> fE] to be the composite. Its first and third components are [f o id] and [id o g]. *)
pose (F := absesmorphism_compose (abses_pushout_morphism E f) (abses_pullback_morphism E g)).

goals.conclusion: abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) $== abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)

contents: (* We change [F] to a morphism that is the same except that the first and third components are [f] and [g]. Then [abses_pushout_is_pullback] shows that the pushout of [Eg] along [f] is equal to the pullback of [fE] along [g]. *)
refine (abses_pushout_is_pullback' (Build_AbSESMorphism f (component2 F) g _ _)); apply F.
(** This is the statement that [AbSES'] is a bifunctor, but we state it separately because Coq is slow to unify [IsBifunctor AbSES'] against goals written in this form. *)

goals.conclusion: abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) = abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)
abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) = abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)

abses_path_data_iso (abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E))
  (abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E))

contents:
Instance is1bifunctor_abses' `{Univalence}
  : Is1Bifunctor (AbSES' : AbGroup^op -> AbGroup -> Type).

goals.conclusion: Is1Bifunctor (AbSES' : AbGroup^op -> AbGroup -> Type)
Is1Bifunctor (AbSES' : AbGroup^op -> AbGroup -> Type)
forall a : AbGroup^op, Is1Functor (AbSES' a)
forall b : AbGroup, Is1Functor (flip AbSES' b)

forall (a0 a1 : AbGroup^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : AbGroup)
(g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 AbSES' a1 g $o fmap10 AbSES' f b0 $==
fmap10 AbSES' f b1 $o fmap01 AbSES' a0 g

forall (a0 a1 : AbGroup^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : AbGroup)
(g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 AbSES' a1 g $o fmap10 AbSES' f b0 $==
fmap10 AbSES' f b1 $o fmap01 AbSES' a0 g
abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) = abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)

contents: (** Given a short exact sequence [A -> E -> B] and maps [f : A -> A'], [g : B' -> B], we can change the order of pushing out along [f] and pulling back along [g]. *)

goals.conclusion: abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) = abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)
abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) = abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)

contents: (* There are morphisms [Eg -> E] and [E -> fE] by definition of the pullback and pushout. We define [F : Eg -> fE] to be the composite. Its first and third components are [f o id] and [id o g]. *)
pose (F := absesmorphism_compose (abses_pushout_morphism E f) (abses_pullback_morphism E g)).

goals.conclusion: abses_pushout f (abses_pullback g E) = abses_pullback g (abses_pushout f E)

contents: (* We change [F] to a morphism that is the same except that the first and third components are [f] and [g]. Then [abses_pushout_is_pullback] shows that the pushout of [Eg] along [f] is equal to the pullback of [fE] along [g]. *)
refine (abses_pushout_is_pullback (Build_AbSESMorphism f (component2 F) g _ _)); apply F.
(** The Baer sum distributes over pullbacks. *)

goals.conclusion:
abses_pullback (f + g) E =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E)

abses_pullback (f + g) E =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E)

abses_pullback (f + g) E =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E)))

abses_pullback (grp_prod_corec f g) (abses_pullback ab_codiagonal E) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E)))

abses_pullback (grp_prod_corec f g)
  (abses_pushout (component1 (abses_codiagonal E)) (abses_direct_sum E E)) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E)))

abses_pullback (grp_prod_corec f g)
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E E)) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E)))

?Goal0 =
abses_pullback (grp_prod_corec f g)
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E E))
?Goal0 = ?Goal

?Goal =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E)))

abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_pullback (grp_prod_corec f g) (abses_direct_sum E E)) =
abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_pullback ab_diagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E)))

abses_pullback (grp_prod_corec f g) (abses_direct_sum E E) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E))

abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod f g $o ab_diagonal) (abses_direct_sum E E) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E))

abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod f g) (abses_direct_sum E E)) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback g E))

contents:
Lemma baer_sum_commutative `{Univalence} {A B : AbGroup} (E F : AbSES B A)
  : abses_baer_sum E F = abses_baer_sum F E.

goals.conclusion: abses_baer_sum E F = abses_baer_sum F E
abses_baer_sum E F = abses_baer_sum F E

abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum F E))

contents: (* The next line uses that [direct_sum_swap $o ab_diagonal] is definitionally equal to [ab_diagonal]: *)

goals.conclusion:
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pullback direct_sum_swap
     (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum F E)))

abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_pullback direct_sum_swap
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum F E))

abses_pushout (ab_codiagonal $o Equiv.cate_fun direct_sum_swap)
  (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_pullback direct_sum_swap
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum F E))

abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_pushout (Equiv.cate_fun direct_sum_swap) (abses_direct_sum E F)) =
abses_pullback direct_sum_swap
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum F E))

abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_pullback (component3 (abses_swap_morphism E F))
     (abses_direct_sum F E)) =
abses_pullback direct_sum_swap
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum F E))

abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_pullback direct_sum_swap (abses_direct_sum F E)) =
abses_pullback direct_sum_swap
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum F E))

contents: (** The right unit law for the Baer sum says that for all [E : AbSES B A], [E + E_0 = E], where [E_0] is the split short exact sequence. *)

Lemma baer_sum_unit_r `{Univalence} {A B : AbGroup} (E : AbSES B A)
  : abses_baer_sum E (point (AbSES B A)) = E.

goals.conclusion: abses_baer_sum E (point (AbSES B A)) = E
abses_baer_sum E (point (AbSES B A)) = E
point (AbSES B A) = ?Goal
abses_baer_sum E ?Goal = E
point (AbSES B A) = ?Goal
abses_baer_sum E (abses_pullback grp_homo_const E) = E

contents: refine (ap (fun F => abses_baer_sum F (abses_pullback grp_homo_const E)) (abses_pullback_id E)^ @ _).

goals.conclusion:
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback grp_homo_id E)
  (abses_pullback grp_homo_const E) =
E
abses_pullback (grp_homo_id + grp_homo_const) E = E

contents: refine (ap (fun f => abses_pullback f E) (grp_unit_r (G := ab_hom _ _) _) @ _).

goals.conclusion: abses_pullback grp_homo_id E = E

contents: (** The left unit law for the Baer sum is analogous. *)

Definition baer_sum_unit_l `{Univalence} {A B : AbGroup} (E : AbSES B A)
  : abses_baer_sum (point (AbSES B A)) E = E
  := baer_sum_commutative _ _ @ baer_sum_unit_r _.
(** For any [E : AbSES B A], the pullback of [E] along [-id_B] acts as an additive inverse for [E] with respect to the Baer sum. *)

Lemma baer_sum_inverse_l `{Univalence} {A B : AbGroup} (E : AbSES B A)
  : abses_baer_sum E (abses_pullback (- grp_homo_id) E) = point (AbSES B A).

goals.conclusion: abses_baer_sum E (abses_pullback (- grp_homo_id) E) = point (AbSES B A)
abses_baer_sum E (abses_pullback (- grp_homo_id) E) = point (AbSES B A)

contents: refine (ap (fun F => abses_baer_sum F (abses_pullback _ E)) (abses_pullback_id E)^ @ _).

goals.conclusion:
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback grp_homo_id E)
  (abses_pullback (- grp_homo_id) E) =
point (AbSES B A)
abses_pullback (grp_homo_id - grp_homo_id) E = point (AbSES B A)
abses_pullback 0 E = point (AbSES B A)

contents: (** The right inverse law follows by commutativity. *)

Definition baer_sum_inverse_r `{Univalence} {A B : AbGroup} (E : AbSES B A)
  : abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback (-grp_homo_id) E) E = point (AbSES B A)
  := baer_sum_commutative _ _ @ baer_sum_inverse_l _.
(** The Baer sum distributes over pushouts. *)

goals.conclusion:
abses_pushout (f + g) E =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E)

abses_pushout (f + g) E =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E)

abses_pushout (f + g) E =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E)))

abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_pushout (grp_prod_corec f g) E) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E)))

abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_pushout (grp_prod_corec f g) E) =
abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_pullback ab_diagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E)))

abses_pushout (grp_prod_corec f g) E =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E))

contents: refine (ap (fun f => abses_pushout f E) (ab_biprod_corec_diagonal f g) @ _).

goals.conclusion:
abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod f g $o ab_diagonal) E =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E))

abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod f g) (abses_pushout ab_diagonal E) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E))

abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod f g)
  (abses_pullback (component3 (abses_diagonal E)) (abses_direct_sum E E)) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E))

abses_pullback (component3 (abses_diagonal E))
  (abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod f g) (abses_direct_sum E E)) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout g E))

contents:
(** Our next goal is to prove that the Baer sum is associative.  Rather than showing this directly, we first prove [baer_sum_twist], which says that [abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum G F) E].  The proof of this mimics the proof of commutativity above.  Then we prove associativity by combining this with commutativity. *)

(** The trinary Baer sum of three short exact sequences. *)

Definition abses_trinary_baer_sum `{Univalence}
  {A B : AbGroup@{u}} (E F G : AbSES B A)
  : AbSES B A
  := abses_pullback ab_triagonal
       (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal
          (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)).
(** For [E, F, G : AbSES B A], the Baer sum of [E], [F] and [G] (associated left) is equal to the trinary Baer sum of [E], [F] and [G]. *)

Lemma baer_sum_is_trinary `{Univalence} {A B : AbGroup@{u}} (E F G : AbSES B A)
  : abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_trinary_baer_sum E F G.

goals.conclusion: abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_trinary_baer_sum E F G
abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_trinary_baer_sum E F G

abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum
        (abses_pullback ab_diagonal
           (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)))
        G)) =
abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id $o ab_diagonal)
  (abses_pushout
     (ab_codiagonal $o functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G))

?Goal =
abses_direct_sum
  (abses_pullback ab_diagonal
     (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)))
  G

abses_pullback ab_diagonal (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal ?Goal) =
abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id $o ab_diagonal)
  (abses_pushout
     (ab_codiagonal $o functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G))

?Goal =
abses_direct_sum
  (abses_pullback ab_diagonal
     (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)))
  G

?Goal =
abses_direct_sum
  (abses_pullback ab_diagonal
     (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)))
  (abses_pullback grp_homo_id G)

?Goal =
abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id)
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)) G)

?Goal0 =
abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)) G

?Goal0 =
abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F))
  (abses_pushout grp_homo_id G)

abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id)
        (abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
           (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)))) =
abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id $o ab_diagonal)
  (abses_pushout
     (ab_codiagonal $o functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G))

abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id)
     (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
        (abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
           (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)))) =
abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id $o ab_diagonal)
  (abses_pushout
     (ab_codiagonal $o functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G))

abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id $o ab_diagonal)
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
        (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G))) =
abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod ab_diagonal grp_homo_id $o ab_diagonal)
  (abses_pushout
     (ab_codiagonal $o functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G))

abses_pushout (ab_codiagonal $o functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G) =
abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod ab_codiagonal grp_homo_id)
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G))

contents: (** For [E, F, G : AbSES B A], we can "twist" the order of the trinary Baer sum as follows. *)

goals.conclusion: abses_trinary_baer_sum E F G = abses_trinary_baer_sum G F E
abses_trinary_baer_sum E F G = abses_trinary_baer_sum G F E

abses_pullback ab_triagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)) =
abses_pullback ab_triagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E))

contents: (* The next line uses the fact that [ab_triagonal] is definitionally equal to [ab_biprod_twist $o ab_triagonal]: *)

goals.conclusion:
abses_pullback ab_triagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)) =
abses_pullback ab_triagonal
  (abses_pullback ab_biprod_twist
     (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal
        (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E)))

abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G) =
abses_pullback ab_biprod_twist
  (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E))

abses_pushout (ab_cotriagonal $o Equiv.cate_fun ab_biprod_twist)
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G) =
abses_pullback ab_biprod_twist
  (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E))

abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal
  (abses_pushout (Equiv.cate_fun ab_biprod_twist)
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum E F) G)) =
abses_pullback ab_biprod_twist
  (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E))

abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal
  (abses_pullback (component3 (abses_twist_directsum E F G))
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E)) =
abses_pullback ab_biprod_twist
  (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E))

abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal
  (abses_pullback ab_biprod_twist (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E)) =
abses_pullback ab_biprod_twist
  (abses_pushout ab_cotriagonal (abses_direct_sum (abses_direct_sum G F) E))

contents: (** It now follows that we can twist the order of the summands in the Baer sum. *)

Lemma baer_sum_twist `{Univalence} {A B : AbGroup@{u}} (E F G : AbSES B A)
  : abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum G F) E.

goals.conclusion: abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum G F) E
abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum G F) E

contents: refine ((baer_sum_is_trinary E F G) @ _ @ (baer_sum_is_trinary G F E)^).

goals.conclusion: abses_trinary_baer_sum E F G = abses_trinary_baer_sum G F E

contents: (** From these results, it finally follows that the Baer sum is associative. *)

goals.conclusion: abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_baer_sum E (abses_baer_sum F G)
abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum E F) G = abses_baer_sum E (abses_baer_sum F G)
abses_baer_sum (abses_baer_sum G F) E = abses_baer_sum E (abses_baer_sum F G)
abses_baer_sum E (abses_baer_sum G F) = abses_baer_sum E (abses_baer_sum F G)
abses_baer_sum G F = abses_baer_sum F G

contents: (** The Baer sum makes [AbSES B A] into an H-space. (In fact, a coherent H-space, but we leave that for now.) *)

Instance ishspace_abses `{Univalence} {B A : AbGroup}
  : IsHSpace (AbSES B A).

goals.conclusion: IsHSpace (AbSES B A)
IsHSpace (AbSES B A)
SgOp (AbSES B A)
LeftIdentity ?hspace_op (point (AbSES B A))
RightIdentity ?hspace_op (point (AbSES B A))
SgOp (AbSES B A)
LeftIdentity abses_baer_sum (point (AbSES B A))
RightIdentity abses_baer_sum (point (AbSES B A))

contents:
Instance is1bifunctor_abses `{Univalence}
  : Is1Bifunctor (AbSES : AbGroup^op -> AbGroup -> pType).

goals.conclusion: Is1Bifunctor (AbSES : AbGroup^op -> AbGroup -> pType)
Is1Bifunctor (AbSES : AbGroup^op -> AbGroup -> pType)
forall a : AbGroup^op, Is1Functor (AbSES a)
forall b : AbGroup, Is1Functor (flip AbSES b)

forall (a0 a1 : AbGroup^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : AbGroup)
(g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 AbSES a1 g $o fmap10 AbSES f b0 $==
fmap10 AbSES f b1 $o fmap01 AbSES a0 g

forall (a0 a1 : AbGroup^op) (f : a0 $-> a1) (b0 b1 : AbGroup)
(g : b0 $-> b1),
fmap01 AbSES a1 g $o fmap10 AbSES f b0 $==
fmap10 AbSES f b1 $o fmap01 AbSES a0 g

fmap01 AbSES a1 g $o fmap10 AbSES f b0 $==
fmap10 AbSES f b1 $o fmap01 AbSES a0 g
IsHSpace (AbSES a1 b1)

fmap01 AbSES a1 g $o fmap10 AbSES f b0 ==
fmap10 AbSES f b1 $o fmap01 AbSES a0 g

fmap01 AbSES a1 g $o fmap10 AbSES f b0 ==
fmap10 AbSES f b1 $o fmap01 AbSES a0 g
abses_pushout g (abses_pullback f E) = abses_pullback f (abses_pushout g E)

contents: (** ** Pushouts and pullbacks respect the Baer sum *)

Definition baer_sum_pushout `{Univalence}
  {A A' B : AbGroup} (f : A $-> A') (E F : AbSES B A)
  : abses_pushout f (abses_baer_sum E F)
    = abses_baer_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F).

goals.conclusion:
abses_pushout f (abses_baer_sum E F) =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F)

abses_pushout f (abses_baer_sum E F) =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F)

abses_pushout f
  (abses_pullback ab_diagonal
     (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F))) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F)))

abses_pushout f (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)) =
abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F))

abses_pushout (f $o ab_codiagonal) (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F))
f $o ab_codiagonal == ?Goal

abses_pushout ?Goal (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F))

abses_pushout (ab_codiagonal $o functor_ab_biprod f f) (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F))

abses_pushout (functor_ab_biprod f f) (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_direct_sum (abses_pushout f E) (abses_pushout f F)

contents:
Definition baer_sum_pullback `{Univalence}
  {A B B' : AbGroup} (f : B' $-> B) (E F : AbSES B A)
  : abses_pullback f (abses_baer_sum E F)
    = abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F).

goals.conclusion:
abses_pullback f (abses_baer_sum E F) =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F)

abses_pullback f (abses_baer_sum E F) =
abses_baer_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F)

abses_pullback f
  (abses_pullback ab_diagonal
     (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F))) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F)))

abses_pullback (ab_diagonal $o f)
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal (abses_direct_sum E F)) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_pushout ab_codiagonal
     (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F)))

abses_pullback (ab_diagonal $o f) (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F))
ab_diagonal $o f == functor_ab_biprod f f $o ab_diagonal

abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod f f $o ab_diagonal) (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F))

abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod f f $o ab_diagonal) (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_pullback ab_diagonal
  (abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F))

abses_pullback (functor_ab_biprod f f) (abses_direct_sum E F) =
abses_direct_sum (abses_pullback f E) (abses_pullback f F)
